results.requirement_text: The system shall require a discount percentage to be between 0 and 100 inclusive.

test_cases.title: Accept discount percentage when value is within 0 to 100 inclusive
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system accepts a discount percentage within the valid range.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Configure a discount percentage within the valid range.
steps.expected_result: The system accepts the discount percentage without error.

test_cases.expected_result: The system accepts the discount percentage within the valid range.
assumptions: Assuming that the system is configured to accept discount percentages within the valid range.

traceability.coverage_item: Accept discount percentage when value is within 0 to 100 inclusive

test_cases.title: Accept discount percentage at boundary values 0 and 100
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system accepts discount percentages at the boundary values.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Configure a discount percentage at the boundary value 0.
steps.expected_result: The system accepts the discount percentage without error.

steps.action: Configure a discount percentage at the boundary value 100.
steps.expected_result: The system accepts the discount percentage without error.

test_cases.expected_result: The system accepts the discount percentages at the boundary values.
assumptions: Assuming that the system is configured to accept discount percentages at the boundary values.

traceability.coverage_item: Accept discount percentage at boundary values 0 and 100
